textPlain: Been going on since 2021.The UK has fined them has fined Clearview AI £7,552,800 in 2022 but they have not paid.EU data protection authorities did not come up with a way to enforce its fines and bans against the US company, allowing Clearview AI to effectively dodge the law.https://ico.org.uk/about-the-ico/media-centre/news-and-blogs...A shit company
